CAT04-008.headline: Culture and Self-Esteem
CAT04-008.subtitle: How individualist and collectivist societies shape worth
CAT04-008.figureLine: Two faceless clay figures stand a measured distance apart, one drawn inward with arms held close and one turned outward toward the other, postures contrasting how worth is found in self and in belonging.
CAT04-008.sceneLine: A single teal-accent form splits gently into two related shapes beside the figures, one compact and self-contained, one wide and open, suggesting two ways a sense of worth takes shape.

CAT04-046.headline: Multiple Cultural Identities
CAT04-046.subtitle: Navigating belonging across more than one culture
CAT04-046.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands at a calm pivot, weight balanced evenly between two directions, posture composed rather than torn, conveying the steady carrying of more than one belonging.
CAT04-046.sceneLine: Two soft light teal arcs overlap into a shared lens of pale teal beside the figure, suggesting distinct identities held together in one calm field.

CAT06-069.headline: Eldercare and Caregiver Guilt
CAT06-069.subtitle: Cultural expectations around caring for aging parents
CAT06-069.figureLine: A single seated clay figure leans slightly forward with both hands cradling empty air, posture tender and weighed down, conveying devotion carried alongside quiet guilt.
CAT06-069.sceneLine: A soft teal-accent form rests in the figure's open hands while a fainter pale teal shape hovers just above, suggesting care given and the unspoken sense that it is never quite enough.

CAT07-010.headline: Depression Across Cultures
CAT07-010.subtitle: How low mood is expressed differently worldwide
CAT07-010.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures sit in a loose circle, each in a slightly different bowed posture, conveying that the same heaviness wears many different shapes.
CAT07-010.sceneLine: A single teal-accent form appears in several soft variations around the figures, each rendered in a different shade from soft light teal to pale teal, suggesting one feeling spoken in many cultural languages.

CAT07-060.headline: Depression in Immigrants
CAT07-060.subtitle: Causes and cultural barriers for refugees and newcomers
CAT07-060.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands holding a small bundle close to its chest, shoulders low, posture between leaving and arriving, conveying heaviness carried across a long distance.
CAT07-060.sceneLine: A long soft light teal form stretches behind the figure toward a faint pale teal horizon ahead, suggesting the weight of where one came from meeting an uncertain new ground.

CAT10-025.headline: Online Radicalization
CAT10-025.subtitle: How algorithms escalate extreme content
CAT10-025.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure leans steadily into a narrowing space, posture pulled forward as if drawn down a tightening channel, conveying gradual capture by an unseen pull.
CAT10-025.sceneLine: A spiral of teal-accent forms tightens inward beside the figure, each loop smaller and more intense in pale teal at its center, suggesting a path that narrows the further one is drawn in.

CAT11-054.headline: Historical Trauma
CAT11-054.subtitle: Inherited wounds in Indigenous communities
CAT11-054.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures stand closely linked in a protective line, each steadying the one beside it, postures grounded and enduring, conveying a community holding memory together.
CAT11-054.sceneLine: A deep teal-accent thread runs unbroken through generations of soft light teal forms behind the figures, surfacing into pale teal at the front, suggesting a long history carried and slowly tended.

CAT12-002.headline: Culture-Bound Syndromes
CAT12-002.subtitle: How culture shapes the experience of distress
CAT12-002.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands cupping a small undefined shape in its hands, posture curious and careful, conveying distress that takes its form from the world around it.
CAT12-002.sceneLine: A teal-accent form held by the figure shifts subtly into different soft light teal outlines depending on the pale teal frame around it, suggesting how culture gives suffering its particular shape.

CAT12-003.headline: Collectivist and Individualist Cultures
CAT12-003.subtitle: Two cultural approaches to mental health
CAT12-003.figureLine: A cluster of faceless clay figures stands gathered as one body on one side while a single figure stands self-possessed on the other, postures contrasting the group and the individual.
CAT12-003.sceneLine: A dense teal-accent weave of many threads sits beside one clear pale teal strand, suggesting two equally valid ways of understanding the self and care.

CAT12-004.headline: East Asian Cultures and Somatization
CAT12-004.subtitle: When emotional distress is felt in the body
CAT12-004.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests one hand against its torso rather than its head, posture quiet and inward, conveying feeling that settles into the body itself.
CAT12-004.sceneLine: A soft light teal current flows downward from where a head would be into the figure's chest in pale teal, suggesting emotion expressed through the body rather than spoken aloud.

CAT12-005.headline: Latin American Communities
CAT12-005.subtitle: Cultural values and pathways to care
CAT12-005.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures stand close in a warm gathered group, one arm of each resting on another, postures interwoven and supportive, conveying care rooted in family and community.
CAT12-005.sceneLine: A ring of teal-accent forms links hand to hand around the figures, brightening into pale teal where they meet, suggesting wellbeing held within a close and warm circle.

CAT12-006.headline: Black and Afro-Diasporic Communities
CAT12-006.subtitle: Mental health across the diaspora
CAT12-006.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures stand in a strong, upright line with shoulders level and open, postures dignified and connected, conveying shared strength carried across many places.
CAT12-006.sceneLine: Branching teal-accent roots spread wide beneath the figures and rise into many soft light teal and pale teal shoots, suggesting one resilient heritage flowering across distant grounds.

CAT12-007.headline: Middle Eastern Cultures
CAT12-007.subtitle: Mental health, honor, and faith
CAT12-007.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands with hands open and slightly raised, posture poised between reverence and reaching out, conveying wellbeing held within faith and dignity.
CAT12-007.sceneLine: A soft light teal arch curves protectively over the figure while a pale teal form rises gently from its open hands, suggesting faith and honor as a sheltering frame around the self.

CAT12-008.headline: South Asian Communities
CAT12-008.subtitle: Barriers to mental health care
CAT12-008.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands behind a thin partial screen, leaning to look past it, posture wanting to step through, conveying silence and stigma standing between need and help.
CAT12-008.sceneLine: A latticed teal-accent screen sits between the figure and a warm pale teal opening, with one soft light teal gap widening, suggesting barriers that can gradually be opened.

CAT12-009.headline: Indigenous Mental Health
CAT12-009.subtitle: Healing traditions and historical trauma
CAT12-009.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures gather in a calm circle around a central low point, postures turned inward in shared attention, conveying healing held within community and ceremony.
CAT12-009.sceneLine: A circular teal-accent form glows softly at the center of the figures while a deeper pale teal thread winds back through time around them, suggesting old wounds tended by enduring tradition.

CAT12-010.headline: The WEIRD Bias
CAT12-010.subtitle: What Western psychology research misses
CAT12-010.figureLine: A single small faceless clay figure stands brightly lit at one edge while many softer figures stand in the wider dimness, postures revealing how few stand in the light of study.
CAT12-010.sceneLine: A narrow teal-accent beam illuminates one small area while a vast field of soft light teal and pale teal forms stretches unlit beyond it, suggesting research drawn from only a sliver of humanity.

CAT12-011.headline: Mental Health Stigma
CAT12-011.subtitle: What it is and how to fight it
CAT12-011.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure pushes gently against a thinning shell around it, posture firm and patient, conveying steady effort to break through shame.
CAT12-011.sceneLine: A brittle teal-accent crust around the figure cracks open to reveal warm pale teal light within, with soft light teal pieces falling away, suggesting stigma dissolving under steady understanding.

CAT12-016.headline: Stigmatizing Language
CAT12-016.subtitle: How words shape attitudes toward mental illness
CAT12-016.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands lightly pressed by small angular forms drifting around it, posture enduring rather than breaking, conveying the quiet weight that careless words carry.
CAT12-016.sceneLine: Sharp teal-accent fragments float near the figure and soften into rounded pale teal shapes as they pass, suggesting harsh language reshaped into kinder forms.

CAT12-017.headline: Anti-Stigma Campaigns
CAT12-017.subtitle: What actually works to change attitudes
CAT12-017.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures step forward together in a steady aligned movement, postures open and unashamed, conveying many people moving public attitudes at once.
CAT12-017.sceneLine: A wide front of soft light teal forms advances together, pushing a dim grey haze back into bright pale teal openness, suggesting collective effort shifting how people see.

CAT12-018.headline: Generational Differences
CAT12-018.subtitle: How age shapes mental health attitudes
CAT12-018.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures of differing scale stand in a gentle line from older to younger, each turned slightly toward the next, postures conveying attitudes passed and changed across ages.
CAT12-018.sceneLine: A teal-accent form repeats down the line growing more open and bright with each step, from muted soft light teal to clear pale teal, suggesting changing views across generations.

CAT12-019.headline: Celebrity Disclosure
CAT12-019.subtitle: How public figures shape mental health attitudes
CAT12-019.figureLine: A single prominent faceless clay figure stands openly in the foreground while many smaller figures behind it begin to straighten and open in turn, postures conveying one disclosure giving others permission.
CAT12-019.sceneLine: A single bright teal-accent point in front sends soft light teal ripples outward across a field of pale teal forms, suggesting one public voice spreading quiet courage.

CAT12-022.headline: Disparities for People of Color
CAT12-022.subtitle: Unequal access to mental health care
CAT12-022.figureLine: Two faceless clay figures reach toward the same distant point, one with a clear short path and one across a longer, more broken stretch, postures conveying unequal distance to the same help.
CAT12-022.sceneLine: Two teal-accent paths lead to one pale teal source, one smooth and one interrupted by gaps of soft light teal, suggesting care that is harder to reach for some than others.

CAT12-023.headline: Racial Microaggressions
CAT12-023.subtitle: The cumulative toll of small slights
CAT12-023.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands steady beneath many tiny forms settling one by one onto its shoulders, posture enduring the slow accumulation, conveying small harms adding to real weight.
CAT12-023.sceneLine: Countless small teal-accent flecks gather gradually around the figure, building from faint soft light teal into a heavier pale teal mass, suggesting many minor slights amounting to a lasting burden.

CAT12-024.headline: Cultural Competence in Therapy
CAT12-024.subtitle: What it actually means in practice
CAT12-024.figureLine: Two faceless clay figures sit facing each other in attentive balance, one leaning in to listen and meet the other, postures conveying care shaped to truly understand a person's world.
CAT12-024.sceneLine: A soft light teal form between the two figures gradually adjusts its shape to fit the pale teal contour of the one being heard, suggesting care that adapts to the person before it.

CAT12-025.headline: Black Mental Health
CAT12-025.subtitle: Breaking the silence in African American communities
CAT12-025.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures stand in a strengthening line as one opens its arms to break a held silence, postures conveying courage moving through a community.
CAT12-025.sceneLine: A muffled teal-accent form opens outward into clear pale teal space beside the figures, with soft light teal ripples spreading, suggesting long-held silence giving way to open voice.

CAT12-026.headline: Hispanic and Latino Mental Health
CAT12-026.subtitle: Barriers to care and cultural values
CAT12-026.figureLine: A close group of faceless clay figures stands gathered with one stepping toward a distant opening, postures conveying strong family bonds and the reach toward outside help.
CAT12-026.sceneLine: A warm cluster of soft light teal forms surrounds the figures while a single pale teal path opens outward, suggesting deep family values alongside the journey to reach care.

CAT12-027.headline: The Model Minority Myth
CAT12-027.subtitle: Asian American mental health under expectation
CAT12-027.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands holding a flawless mask-like form before it while its own posture sags quietly behind, conveying strain hidden behind an image of effortless success.
CAT12-027.sceneLine: A polished pale teal surface faces outward while a strained soft light teal form bends behind it in teal-accent shadow, suggesting a perfect front concealing real weight.

CAT12-028.headline: Multiracial and Multicultural Identity
CAT12-028.subtitle: Mental health while navigating mixed identity
CAT12-028.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands composed at the meeting point of several gentle currents, weight settled at the center, conveying a self formed where many worlds converge.
CAT12-028.sceneLine: Several soft light teal streams flow inward and blend into one unified pale teal form beside the figure, suggesting many heritages becoming a single whole self.

CAT12-029.headline: Students of Color
CAT12-029.subtitle: Mental health at predominantly white institutions
CAT12-029.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands among many uniform identical forms, slightly apart and self-aware, posture conveying the strain of being one of few in a sea of sameness.
CAT12-029.sceneLine: A single warm teal-accent figure-form stands within a wide field of cooler pale teal shapes, holding its color steady, suggesting standing apart while keeping a strong sense of self.

CAT12-030.headline: Culturally Adapted Therapies
CAT12-030.subtitle: Why tailored care produces better outcomes
CAT12-030.figureLine: Two faceless clay figures work together arranging a form so it fits one of them precisely, postures attentive and collaborative, conveying care reshaped to fit a person's culture.
CAT12-030.sceneLine: A generic teal-accent form is gently reshaped into a snug pale teal fit beside the figures, with soft light teal edges molding to contour, suggesting treatment tailored to the person it serves.

CAT12-031.headline: Phases of Immigration
CAT12-031.subtitle: Mental health challenges across the journey
CAT12-031.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure is shown in a sequence of postures from departing, to traveling, to standing newly arrived, conveying the changing emotional weight of each stage.
CAT12-031.sceneLine: A line of teal-accent forms moves through distinct stages from a soft light teal beginning to a pale teal arrival, each marked differently, suggesting the shifting demands of a long migration.

CAT12-032.headline: Refugee Mental Health
CAT12-032.subtitle: Trauma, displacement, and resilience
CAT12-032.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands steadying itself after a long journey, one hand reaching toward firmer ground ahead, posture between exhaustion and quiet endurance, conveying resilience after upheaval.
CAT12-032.sceneLine: Behind the figure a scattered field of soft light teal forms gives way to a steadier pale teal ground ahead, with a calm teal-accent light, suggesting safety and steadiness slowly returning.

CAT12-033.headline: Asylum Seekers and Refugees
CAT12-033.subtitle: Mental health crisis amid uncertain waiting
CAT12-033.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands waiting at a threshold, weight shifted toward an unseen decision ahead, posture patient and uncertain, conveying the long strain of waiting in limbo.
CAT12-033.sceneLine: A soft light teal figure pauses before a faint pale teal doorway that has not yet opened, held in a calm teal-accent stillness, suggesting the heavy uncertainty of waiting to be received.

CAT12-034.headline: Acculturation Stress
CAT12-034.subtitle: The mental toll of adapting to a new culture
CAT12-034.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure leans into a steady headwind while keeping its footing, posture effortful but upright, conveying the daily strain of adapting to unfamiliar ground.
CAT12-034.sceneLine: Streams of soft light teal pass against the figure as it holds a steady pale teal stance, a calm teal-accent center keeping it grounded, suggesting effortful adjustment held with balance.

CAT12-035.headline: Language Barriers in Care
CAT12-035.subtitle: Why they cause harm and how to bridge them
CAT12-035.figureLine: Two faceless clay figures reach toward each other across a gap, hands not quite meeting, postures straining to connect, conveying meaning lost in the space between them.
CAT12-035.sceneLine: A teal-accent thread frays into a gap between the two figures, then is rejoined by a soft light teal bridge spanning to pale teal, suggesting understanding restored across a divide of words.

CAT12-036.headline: Undocumented Immigrants
CAT12-036.subtitle: Mental health challenges in the shadows
CAT12-036.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands partly drawn back from open view, holding itself small and watchful, posture conveying the constant strain of living unseen.
CAT12-036.sceneLine: A soft light teal figure stands half within a quiet teal-accent shadow, a small pale teal opening of light nearby, suggesting life lived guarded and out of sight while help waits beyond.

CAT12-037.headline: Children of Immigrants
CAT12-037.subtitle: Growing up between two worlds
CAT12-037.figureLine: A single small faceless clay figure stands balanced between two larger gentle forms on either side, weight evenly held, conveying a young life bridging two cultures at once.
CAT12-037.sceneLine: A small pale teal form stands where two larger soft light teal fields meet and overlap, a calm teal-accent seam between them, suggesting a child carrying two worlds in one self.

CAT12-039.headline: International Students
CAT12-039.subtitle: Isolation and barriers to care abroad
CAT12-039.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure sits alone with study materials suggested only by an empty surrounding space, posture quietly isolated, conveying distance from home and unfamiliar surroundings.
CAT12-039.sceneLine: A single soft light teal figure sits within a wide, sparse pale teal expanse, a faint teal-accent thread reaching toward a distant point, suggesting isolation and a far-off sense of home.

CAT12-040.headline: Culturally Responsive Services
CAT12-040.subtitle: Building mental health care for immigrants
CAT12-040.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures arrange welcoming open forms around a newly arriving figure, postures attentive and accommodating, conveying systems built to truly receive newcomers.
CAT12-040.sceneLine: Soft light teal forms reshape themselves into an open pale teal doorway around the figures, lit by a warm teal-accent glow, suggesting care built to welcome many backgrounds.

CAT12-041.headline: Traditional and Evidence-Based Healing
CAT12-041.subtitle: Bringing ancestral and clinical practice together
CAT12-041.figureLine: Two faceless clay figures stand on either side of a shared form, each contributing a hand to shape it together, postures conveying old and new wisdom working as one.
CAT12-041.sceneLine: An ancestral soft light teal form and a measured pale teal form merge into one balanced teal-accent shape between the figures, suggesting tradition and evidence joined in care.

CAT12-042.headline: Mindfulness
CAT12-042.subtitle: Buddhist origins and clinical applications
CAT12-042.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests in calm, upright stillness with hands settled, posture grounded and unhurried, conveying quiet attention to the present moment.
CAT12-042.sceneLine: A soft teal-accent ripple settles into a still pale teal surface beside the seated figure, soft light teal rings fading to calm, suggesting a quieting mind coming to rest.

CAT12-043.headline: Ayurveda and Mental Health
CAT12-043.subtitle: Doshas, gunas, and mind-body balance
CAT12-043.figureLine: A single standing clay figure holds itself in even, centered poise, weight distributed in calm equilibrium, conveying harmony sought between body and mind.
CAT12-043.sceneLine: Three soft light teal currents circle the figure and settle into balanced proportion around a steady pale teal center, lit by teal-accent calm, suggesting elements held in mind-body balance.

CAT12-044.headline: Traditional Chinese Medicine
CAT12-044.subtitle: Approaches to psychological wellness
CAT12-044.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands relaxed as a smooth current seems to flow unobstructed through its form, posture open and at ease, conveying inner energy moving freely.
CAT12-044.sceneLine: A continuous teal-accent channel winds smoothly through and around the figure, brightening from soft light teal to pale teal where it flows freely, suggesting balanced, unblocked vitality.

CAT12-045.headline: Indigenous Healing Practices
CAT12-045.subtitle: Ceremony, community, and wholeness
CAT12-045.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures gather in a close circle facing inward together, postures unified and grounded, conveying healing found in shared ceremony and belonging.
CAT12-045.sceneLine: A warm teal-accent glow rises at the center of the figures' circle and ripples outward through soft light teal into pale teal, suggesting community gathered around shared wholeness.

CAT12-046.headline: Faith-Based Counseling
CAT12-046.subtitle: Where spiritual support meets mental health
CAT12-046.figureLine: Two faceless clay figures sit close in attentive companionship, one leaning gently toward the other in support, postures conveying care held within shared faith.
CAT12-046.sceneLine: A soft light teal light descends gently over the two figures and meets a steady pale teal ground between them, framed in calm teal-accent, suggesting spiritual support meeting practical care.

CAT12-048.headline: Ubuntu and Community Models
CAT12-048.subtitle: Community-based mental health around the world
CAT12-048.figureLine: Many faceless clay figures stand woven together so closely that each supports the others, postures conveying a self that exists through community.
CAT12-048.sceneLine: Countless soft light teal forms interlace into one continuous pale teal fabric, no single thread standing alone, lit by warm teal-accent, suggesting wellbeing held by all together.

CAT12-049.headline: Global Mental Health Policy
CAT12-049.subtitle: The WHO treatment gap worldwide
CAT12-049.figureLine: Many small faceless clay figures stand across a wide field where only a few are reached by gentle care, postures conveying the vast gap between need and available help.
CAT12-049.sceneLine: A broad field of pale teal forms stretches into the distance while only a small near cluster glows with teal-accent and soft light teal light, suggesting how few are reached worldwide.

CAT12-050.headline: Responsive Healthcare Systems
CAT12-050.subtitle: Building culturally responsive mental healthcare
CAT12-050.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures work together arranging open forms into a welcoming structure around many different figures, postures conveying systems built to fit diverse needs.
CAT12-050.sceneLine: Adaptable soft light teal forms assemble into a flexible pale teal framework that bends to fit many shapes, lit by teal-accent, suggesting care systems shaped to serve everyone.

CAT15-046.headline: Architecture and Connection
CAT15-046.subtitle: How urban design affects social connection
CAT15-046.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures stand within an open, inviting arrangement of forms that draws them naturally together, postures relaxed and sociable, conveying space that fosters connection.
CAT15-046.sceneLine: Soft light teal structural forms curve to create shared gathering pockets of pale teal between the figures, lit by warm teal-accent, suggesting design that brings people together.

CAT17-003.headline: Older Adults Underdiagnosed
CAT17-003.subtitle: Why mental health in aging is overlooked
CAT17-003.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands quietly at the edge of attention, partly turned away, posture conveying a person whose needs go unseen and unspoken.
CAT17-003.sceneLine: A soft light teal figure stands just outside a circle of pale teal light that does not quite reach it, a faint teal-accent glow nearby, suggesting needs overlooked and waiting to be seen.

CAT17-004.headline: The Aging Brain
CAT17-004.subtitle: Neuroplasticity, what changes and what endures
CAT17-004.figureLine: A single seated clay figure reaches calmly to reshape a small form before it, posture engaged and capable, conveying a mind that keeps adapting with age.
CAT17-004.sceneLine: A weathered teal-accent lattice beside the figure quietly grows fresh soft light teal connections into pale teal, suggesting a mind still forming new pathways late in life.

CAT17-011.headline: What Is Dementia
CAT17-011.subtitle: Types, causes, and progression
CAT17-011.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure stands cared for and steadied by a gentle supporting presence beside it, posture calm and held, conveying steadiness offered through gradual change.
CAT17-011.sceneLine: A soft light teal lattice beside the figure thins slowly while a steady pale teal hand-form holds its shape, lit by gentle teal-accent, suggesting memory tended with calm care.

CAT17-014.headline: Types of Dementia
CAT17-014.subtitle: Vascular, Lewy body, and other forms explained
CAT17-014.figureLine: A single faceless clay figure rests calmly while several distinct supporting forms gather steadily around it, posture settled and held, conveying many conditions met with the same gentle care.
CAT17-014.sceneLine: Several different soft light teal lattices each shift in their own quiet way around the figure, all held within one steady pale teal frame and teal-accent light, suggesting varied forms met with shared steadiness.

CAT17-015.headline: Dementia Risk and Prevention
CAT17-015.subtitle: Protecting the brain across the lifespan
CAT17-015.figureLine: A single standing clay figure takes calm, deliberate steps forward while tending small forms along its path, posture steady and purposeful, conveying protective habits built over a lifetime.
CAT17-015.sceneLine: A line of soft light teal forms strengthens into resilient pale teal shapes along the figure's path, lit by steady teal-accent, suggesting protective choices reinforcing the mind over time.

CAT17-027.headline: Elder Care and Family
CAT17-027.subtitle: Cultural expectations around caring for elders
CAT17-027.figureLine: Several faceless clay figures of differing scale stand linked across generations, the younger steadying the eldest with care, postures conveying duty and devotion held within family.
CAT17-027.sceneLine: A continuous teal-accent thread links generations of soft light teal forms into one supported pale teal whole, suggesting care for elders carried gently across a family.
